items.title: Certs expand where you compete

items.title: You can stack certifications

template_data.image_headline: CERTS OPEN DOORS. STRATEGY WINS BIDS.
template_data.image_prompt: Infographic checklist layout. Dark navy background. Bold headline at top: 'CERTS OPEN DOORS. STRATEGY WINS BIDS.' with shield icon. Left column: illustrated professional woman in blazer holding a certification badge, confident posture. Right column: 5 checklist rows with green checkmarks and short 3-word labels: 'EXPAND COMPETITION', 'STACK THEM', '9-YEAR CLOCK', 'CVE REQUIRED', 'ONGOING COMPLIANCE'. Bottom coral accent banner with short phrase: 'Tools, not guarantees.' Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
